name: api-auth
description: API authentication and authorization authoring: token models (session, opaque, JWT), Laravel Sanctum vs Passport, OAuth2/OIDC flows with Authorization Code + PKCE, scopes and least privilege, refresh-token rotation with reuse detection, secure httpOnly-cookie storage, hashing at rest, and revocation/expiry — a firing api-auth skill and a /api-auth:review command. The day-one token-secured-API decisions and top OWASP auth failures.
